message:
feat: add eigenvectors, multi-dim FFT, special math functions, and NPZ support

- fnp-linalg: eig_nxn_full() returns eigenvalues + eigenvectors via
  QR-accumulated Schur form with complex conjugate pair reconstruction
- fnp-ufunc: irfft(), fft2(), ifft2() for multi-dimensional Fourier transforms
- fnp-ufunc: gamma(), lgamma(), erf(), erfc(), digamma() special math functions
  using Lanczos and Abramowitz & Stegun approximations
- fnp-io: write_npz_bytes() and read_npz_bytes() for NPZ archive format
  with ZIP STORE, CRC-32, and full validation
- 18 new tests across all three crates (884 total, 0 failures)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
